LanguageData.VME_Sweets_Craved.description:
Desserts and treats shouldn’t be withheld, sugary confections should be eaten at least every couple days.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Bear in mind this precept has a minimum expectation required. Moderate expectations or higher are needed for the "Desserts" need to show up.

 - Desserts that increase the need: Chocolate (10%), Simple dessert (15%), Fine dessert (25%), Lavish dessert (35%), Gourmet dessert (50%)
LanguageData.VME_Sweets_Craved.label: craved
LanguageData.VME_Sweets_Impartial.description: Sweets aren’t that great, they can easily be left behind.
LanguageData.VME_Sweets_Impartial.label: impartial
